prompt: Create a sophisticated editorial hero image for 'Agentic AI Requires Human Oversight Architecture'. Depict an autonomous decision engine operating inside a visible governance envelope with human oversight points, authority boundaries, telemetry, escalation, and rollback. Use abstract enterprise AI imagery, no humanoid robots, no vendor branding, and no implication of unrestricted autonomy.
proof_boundaries: Do not imply capabilities of specific current AI products.
Do not claim quantified safety, reliability, or business outcomes.
Do not imply one oversight model fits every risk class.
